title: NvmMetadata access/flags fields undocumented raw C values
description: NvmMetadata has public fields access: u16 and flags: u16 that are raw C values with no documented semantics in the Rust API. nvm_overwrite also takes access: u16 and flags: u16 with no guidance. Callers must either read the wolfHSM C headers or guess. There are no named constants or bit-flag types in the Rust surface. This will generate recurring issue reports asking what values are valid, and callers will cargo-cult zeros from examples without understanding the implications. At minimum, the doc comment should cross-reference the wolfHSM C header constant names.
